_comment: THE BRAIN's job table + budget policy (ORGANISM_ANATOMY §5). The brain runs HOT by the captain's standing order (12 Jul 2026, with Nidhi): exhaust the Claude Max 5x plan every rolling window and every week; weight the heavy work overnight; protect his study hours; never touch an API key. brain.mjs is the sole reader; edits here are canon edits.

budget._note: Anthropic publishes no exact Max-5x token caps, so these start conservative and SELF-TUNE: any observed limit event records the true ceiling into brain_queue.json (observed_window_ceiling) and the runtime re-fits. The ledger learns the plan's real shape instead of pretending to know it.

guards._note: Hype in output is a bug (CONDUCTOR §1). The API-key guard keeps the hard $100 ceiling: subscription only, ever.

ntfy._note: Morning sheet push only. Nothing else ever pings. Enable via setup/NTFY_SETUP.md.

gemini._note: Second brain — visualization + long-context. Free CLI on his Google account (Pro sub raises limits). Enable via setup/GEMINI_CLI_SETUP.md. Degrades gracefully while absent.

jobs._note: M-3 live: runManager({llm}) — the Manager's own validator rejects any invented number; fallback skeleton guarantees the sheet regardless.
Acts through files only — analysis for the wall and the evening; never a ping, never new work.
Clustering ASSIST over doubtminer's parse — output is a proposal file; captain batch-glances; nothing auto-writes to capsules.
Anchor-metaphor assist. Extraction, never invention: validator rejects any anchor text not verbatim-present in the input.
Phrase tomorrow's compiled drills in the DOSSIER register. drills.json stays complete without this — enrichment only.
≤3 insight lines; viz.mjs re-validates before rendering.
The week in evidence lines; words the Boot Room's deterministic proposal — never invents evidence.

Exhaustion filler with real value: pre-draft the Daraar-map probe angles for the NEXT unlocked syllabus concepts, seeded where his cracks historically form. Never shown pre-Pehle-Guess; feeds the Gem prompt pack.
Runs only when scout.json has a staged scrimmage: builds the full R-late mock brief in idle tokens so it sits ready the morning his numbers arrive.
Runs only when gemini.enabled — rich visual HTML/infographic spec from the same wall data.
